name: Liberty Autoland II LLC
description_short: Used car dealer in Orlando, FL offering in-house financing with guaranteed approval for customers with good, bad, or no credit history.
description_long:
Liberty Autoland II LLC is a full-service used car dealership located at 6555 S Orange Avenue in Orlando, Florida, serving Orange County and surrounding areas including Fairview Shores, Conway, Pine Castle, and multiple other central Florida towns. The dealership has been in operation since 2003 and maintains extended business hours (9:30 AM–8:00 PM Monday–Saturday, 11:00 AM–5:00 PM Sunday) to accommodate customer schedules.

The dealership specializes in pre-owned luxury vehicles at wholesale prices, with inventory spanning 23+ major brands including BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Lexus, Porsche, Range Rover, Infiniti, and mainstream manufacturers like Honda, Toyota, and Ford. Their primary financial service is a "Buy Here Pay Here" model combined with in-house sub-prime financing. They explicitly advertise "NO CREDIT BAD CREDIT??? NO PROBLEM!!!" and claim to offer guaranteed financing regardless of credit history. The dealership also welcomes trade-ins and offers extended service contracts and warranties on selected vehicles.

What distinguishes Liberty Autoland is their aggressive credit-inclusive financing approach and wide luxury inventory at wholesale pricing. Unlike traditional dealerships that require prime credit scores, they position themselves as a lender of last resort, claiming credit history "may not be a problem as you might think." They maintain relationships with multiple banks and lending institutions throughout Florida to originate loans, though specifics on rates, terms, and APR are not disclosed on the website.

However, the lack of transparent pricing on financing terms is a significant caveat. As a "Buy Here Pay Here" operation, customers typically make weekly or bi-weekly payments directly to the dealership, which often involves GPS tracking and starter interrupt devices on vehicles—standard industry practices not mentioned on their site. The business model inherently targets subprime borrowers, meaning rates and terms are likely unfavorable compared to traditional auto financing. No information is provided about loan terms, interest rates, down payment requirements, or default consequences.
pros: Guaranteed financing advertised for customers with good, bad, or no credit history
Wide inventory of 23+ vehicle brands including luxury (BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Porsche, Lexus) and mainstream makes
Buy Here Pay Here model allows direct financing without traditional bank approval
Trade-ins accepted, providing alternative payment methods for customers
Extended hours (9:30 AM–8:00 PM most days) for working customers
Extended service contracts and warranties available on select vehicles
Multiple contact methods (phone, text) for customer accessibility
cons: No disclosure of APR, interest rates, payment terms, or loan duration on website
No down payment requirements or monthly payment amounts listed
Typical Buy Here Pay Here model involves GPS tracking and starter interrupt devices (not disclosed)
Sub-prime lending inherently carries much higher costs than traditional auto financing
No information about what happens in case of default or late payment
best_for: Customers with poor or no credit history needing immediate vehicle financing
Buyers seeking luxury pre-owned vehicles without qualifying for traditional financing
Those with bad credit who cannot obtain loans from conventional auto lenders
Customers prioritizing guaranteed approval over favorable interest rates
diagnosis: Liberty Autoland is a subprime auto lender disguised primarily as a used car dealership. It serves customers excluded from traditional auto financing due to credit issues, offering guaranteed approval but with the tradeoffs typical of Buy Here Pay Here operations: high interest rates, tracking devices, and limited transparency. Best suited for desperate borrowers with no alternative financing options, not for rate-conscious shoppers.
services: Buy Here Pay Here auto financing
Sub-prime auto loans for bad/no credit
Inventory search by make, model, year, and price
Financing relationship facilitation with banks and lending institutions
